title: helm/deploy input
description: Input Contract for the targetless helm/deploy Action (ADR-0092 dual-surface): deploy ONE Helm release to ONE named namespace (helm upgrade --install, Helm-4 flags), with no View anchor — the self-deploy / single-release build path (mirrors crossplane/provision). The per-target Actuator (actuators/helm.input) is the fleet-deploy half. MUTATING — this Action must sit behind a Gate. `values` is opaque, validated against the chart's own schema by helm (§1.1).

chart.description: Chart reference: an OCI ref (oci://…, pin by digest — §7.3), a repo chart name (with `repo`), or a local path under the plugin's chart root.

repo.description: Chart repository URL for a non-OCI repo chart (helm --repo).

version.description: Exact chart version (or digest) — pin in production (§7.3).

values.description: Values overlay, rendered as a values file. Opaque to Stratt (§1.1).

createNamespace.description: Create the target namespace if absent (helm --create-namespace).
